decks.notes: This deck focuses on utilizing Quintorius, History Chaser as the commander to create a fast-paced aggressive strategy in a Duel Commander format. It includes a mix of powerful creatures, removal spells, and mana ramp to quickly establish board presence and overwhelm the opponent. The deck also includes various utility cards like Enlightened Tutor and Expedition Map to search for key pieces and disrupt the opponent's game plan. By combining efficient creatures with disruptive spells and strong artifacts, the deck aims to apply pressure early on and maintain control of the game to secure victory. With a focus on aggression and strategic resource management, this deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver opponents in fast-paced one-on-one matches.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy using a mix of removal spells, prison effects, and powerful creatures. The commander, Quintorius, History Chaser, provides card advantage and allows for reusing valuable creatures from the graveyard. The deck includes a variety of mana sources to ensure a consistent curve and access to the necessary colors of mana. It also features efficient removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Swords to Plowshares, as well as enchantment-based removal like Parallax Wave and Chained to the Rocks. Additionally, the deck includes powerful creatures like Magda, the Hoardmaster and Solitude to apply pressure and close out the game quickly.

This aggro deck centered around Kalain, Reclusive Painter focuses on maximizing mana efficiency and card draw to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and powerful spells. The deck includes a mix of fast mana sources, tutors, and disruptive spells to both accelerate its own game plan and disrupt the opponent's strategy. By efficiently generating mana and drawing through the deck with spells like Dark Petition and Necropotence, the deck aims to assemble a lethal combination of cards like Tendrils of Agony or Peer into the Abyss to finish off the opponent in a single explosive turn. The deck's explosive potential and ability to quickly close out games make it a formidable force in one-on-one matchups.

This deck revolves around controlling the board through counterspells and removal while also maintaining a steady stream of threats to pressure the opponent. Aang, Swift Savior, serves as the commander, offering protection and flexibility in combat. The deck includes a mix of efficient creatures, disruptive spells, and powerful enchantments to disrupt the opponent's game plan and advance its own. By efficiently managing resources and carefully timing plays, the deck aims to outmaneuver opponents and close out games quickly. With access to a variety of spells and creatures that can generate card advantage, the deck can grind out longer games or pivot to a more aggressive strategy when needed.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through counterspells, bounce spells, and card advantage, while also utilizing High Tide and mana doublers to generate a large amount of mana. Baral, Chief of Compliance helps to reduce the cost of instants and sorceries, allowing for more efficient use of spells. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while also setting up for big plays with cards like Emrakul, the Promised End and Ugin, the Eye of the Storms. It also includes some win conditions like Murktide Regent and Palinchron to close out the game quickly once the opponent's resources have been depleted.

The deck revolves around creating and sacrificing tokens to generate value and burn opponents with cards like Mayhem Devil and Purphoros, God of the Forge. Prossh, Skyraider of Kher is the commander who can create a horde of tokens upon entering the battlefield, and can quickly become a lethal threat when combined with cards like Goblin Bombardment and Blood Artist. The deck utilizes mana acceleration with cards like Arbor Elf and Fyndhorn Elves to quickly ramp into its combo pieces. It also includes various tutors like Demonic Tutor to find key combo pieces. Overall, the strategy focuses on synergistic combos and efficient token generation to overwhelm opponents in quick succession.

The deck focuses on utilizing control elements such as counterspells, removal, and card draw to disrupt the opponent's plans and maintain a strong board presence. Tasigur, the Golden Fang serves as the commander, providing access to powerful cards and graveyard recursion. The deck aims to control the game through a combination of countering threats, removing problematic creatures, and drawing into key cards to secure victory. With a mix of reactive spells and proactive threats, the deck seeks to outmaneuver opponents and establish dominance on the battlefield. By utilizing a versatile and flexible strategy, the deck aims to adapt to different matchups and emerge victorious through careful decision-making and strategic play.

This deck focuses on a fast-paced aggressive strategy using the Partner commanders Kraum and Yoshimaru to apply pressure and maintain card advantage. The deck includes a mix of efficient creatures, removal spells, and disruptive cards to control the board and keep the opponent on the back foot. By combining red, white, and blue cards, the deck can present a diverse range of threats and answers to adapt to different situations. The inclusion of powerful equipment like Embercleave and Skullclamp enhances the deck's aggro potential, while cards like Thalia and Containment Priest disrupt opponents' strategies. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly and efficiently while maintaining card advantage and board control.
